channel.title: Joseph Carlson's Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Joseph Carlson's Blog

item.title: Introduction
item.description: I can go through the formal education and limited work experience I have in IT. An associate’s degree, a few jobs, some certifications, all supposedly leading indicators of a successful career. My opinion, they’re nice to have, but people rely too much on institutions approving and certifying the competence of certain domains. A piece of paper that says, “you got a chance at being able to do this job” or “maybe you won’t lose this company money”. Maybe it’s just a statement that you can commit yourself to a goal and stick with it for four years in the case of the oh-so-revered Bachelor’s degree.
